events.text: Didier Zokora (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Colombia 1, Côte d'Ivoire 0. James Rodríguez (Colombia) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Juan Cuadrado with a cross   following a corner.

Goal!  Colombia 2, Côte d'Ivoire 0. Juan Fernando Quintero (Colombia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Teófilo Gutiérrez with a through ball   following a fast break.
Goal!  Colombia 2, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Gervinho (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Arthur Boka.
Cheick Tioté (Côte d'Ivoire) is shown the yellow card.
